use_cases.title: Multi-session gateway with different models
use_cases.flow: Agent A sends request with Claude model, setModelLimits() sets Opus context limits. Agent B sends request with GPT-4, setModelLimits() overwrites with GPT-4 limits. Agent A's next request should still use Opus limits.
postconditions: Each session uses its own model's context limits
No cross-session contamination of module-level globals

use_cases.title: Long-running gateway session lifecycle
preconditions: Sessions connect and disconnect over 24+ hours
use_cases.flow: Sessions connect and create sessionStates/limiters. Sessions disconnect but state remains in memory. New sessions add more state. Memory grows monotonically. Periodic 30s flush persists critical state. Process crash or restart recovers from DB.
postconditions: Memory usage stabilizes or old sessions are evicted
State recovery within 30s of last checkpoint
No data loss on saveForceMinLayer calls

use_cases.title: Agentic workflow through OpenAI upstream
preconditions: Agent uses OpenAI Chat Completions protocol
use_cases.flow: Agent calls tool via tool_use block. Gateway forwards to upstream. Model generates tool call. Tool executes and returns result. Gateway builds next upstream request with tool_result. Model sees tool results and continues.
postconditions: Tool results visible to model in subsequent turns

use_cases.title: Tool result round-trip via Anthropic translator
use_cases.flow: buildAnthropicRequest at translate/anthropic.ts:333 converts gateway tool_result to Anthropic tool_result content block. Upstream processes it. Response flows back.
postconditions: tool_result block present and correct in upstream request

use_cases.title: Tool result round-trip via OpenAI translator
preconditions: Gateway proxying to OpenAI Chat Completions API
Tool results from prior turns in messages
use_cases.flow: buildOpenAIUpstreamRequest at translate/openai.ts:423 should convert gateway tool_result to role:tool message with tool_call_id. Currently BROKEN: tool_result blocks silently dropped at line 523-527.
postconditions: tool_result present as role:tool message in upstream request (CURRENTLY VIOLATED — CB-006)

use_cases.title: Tool result round-trip via Responses API translator
preconditions: Gateway proxying to OpenAI Responses API
use_cases.flow: buildOpenAIResponsesUpstreamRequest at translate/openai-responses.ts:211 converts gateway messages including tool results to Responses API input format.
postconditions: tool_result present in upstream Responses API request

use_cases.title: Error propagation in native Anthropic streaming
use_cases.flow: Upstream sends SSE error event. stream/anthropic.ts accumulator at line 209-229 processes all event types. Error event forwarded to client as-is.
postconditions: Client sees error details with type and message

use_cases.title: Error propagation in OpenAI Chat Completions streaming
preconditions: Streaming request translated from OpenAI to Anthropic
use_cases.flow: Upstream sends SSE error event. stream/openai.ts translator has no explicit error handler. Event falls through silently. Stream terminates with [DONE] from catch block at lines 296-303. Currently BROKEN: client sees silent termination.
postconditions: Client should see error details (CURRENTLY VIOLATED — CB-012, client sees only [DONE])

use_cases.title: Error propagation in Responses API streaming
actors: Anthropic upstream via Responses API translation
preconditions: Streaming request translated from Responses API to Anthropic
use_cases.flow: Upstream sends SSE error event. stream/openai-responses.ts translator emits response.failed event at lines 687-711 with error details.
postconditions: Client sees response.failed event with error message and type
